sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n81000" key="perdi/keios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περδίκ-ειος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῑ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype></foreign>, <sense id="n81000.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of a partridge</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κρέα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:6:33" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.33</biblScope></bibl></cit>, cf. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
